html:
Leave Request Approved

Dear Dr. Dr. Alice Smith,

Your request for leave on 2026-07-22 has been approved by the administrator.

Your calendar availability for this date has been blocked. 0 conflicting appointment bookings were cancelled and affected patients have been notified.


Best regards,
Clinic Administration
